subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — it's great to hear from Partner Corp, and we appreciate your interest in exploring synergies between our teams.

We'd be happy to arrange an introductory call this coming week. We're fairly flexible, but here are a few slots that work well on our side:

- Tuesday (April 1) — 10:00–11:00 AM or 2:00–3:00 PM (UTC)
- Wednesday (April 2) — 9:00–10:00 AM or 3:00–4:00 PM (UTC)
- Thursday (April 3) — 11:00 AM–12:00 PM (UTC)

Let us know if any of those work for you, or feel free to suggest alternatives.

Regarding the contact directory and direct phone lines — I'm not able to share internal contact details externally, but I'd be happy to facilitate introductions to the right people on our side once we've had our initial conversation and identified the best path forward.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
